meta.title: Gabriel Schoenfeld discussing the U.S. drones hacked by Iraqi insurgents on CNN
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Gabriel Schoenfeld appeared on CNN December 17, 2009 to discuss the U.S. drones that were hacked by Iraqi insurgents.
